## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss automation progress and content generation strategy for Deepgram's use case articles.](https://fathom.video/share/SMYz7BeDXLx9yWSGoss8wPmNbLgPMSLm?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [FWD.digital has developed a robust, AI-driven content generation pipeline for creating industry-specific use case articles for Deepgram](https://fathom.video/share/SMYz7BeDXLx9yWSGoss8wPmNbLgPMSLm?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [The process includes research, title generation, outline creation, and article writing with multiple human review steps](https://fathom.video/share/SMYz7BeDXLx9yWSGoss8wPmNbLgPMSLm?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Next steps involve calibration articles, refining the company description, and potentially incorporating Deepgram-specific knowledge bases](https://fathom.video/share/SMYz7BeDXLx9yWSGoss8wPmNbLgPMSLm?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

## Topics

### Content Generation Pipeline Overview

  - [Multi-step process: keyword/topic input → research → title generation → outline creation → article writing](https://fathom.video/share/SMYz7BeDXLx9yWSGoss8wPmNbLgPMSLm?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [Uses two research agents: Google-based and u.com API](https://fathom.video/share/SMYz7BeDXLx9yWSGoss8wPmNbLgPMSLm?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [Implements vector database for efficient source processing and retrieval](https://fathom.video/share/SMYz7BeDXLx9yWSGoss8wPmNbLgPMSLm?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Includes human review steps for title, outline, and article refinement](https://fathom.video/share/SMYz7BeDXLx9yWSGoss8wPmNbLgPMSLm?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Post-processing to align with Deepgram's voice and remove AI giveaways](https://fathom.video/share/SMYz7BeDXLx9yWSGoss8wPmNbLgPMSLm?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Challenges and Considerations

  - [Limited existing content on AI voice agents for specific industries](https://fathom.video/share/SMYz7BeDXLx9yWSGoss8wPmNbLgPMSLm?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
  - [May need to adjust research and citation approach due to lack of sources](https://fathom.video/share/SMYz7BeDXLx9yWSGoss8wPmNbLgPMSLm?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
  - [Potential to incorporate Deepgram-specific knowledge (e.g., podcast transcripts) into the process](https://fathom.video/share/SMYz7BeDXLx9yWSGoss8wPmNbLgPMSLm?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

### Content Strategy and Volume

  - [Aiming for unique, well-formatted content targeting niche topics](https://fathom.video/share/SMYz7BeDXLx9yWSGoss8wPmNbLgPMSLm?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Initial goal: 20-30 articles after calibration](https://fathom.video/share/SMYz7BeDXLx9yWSGoss8wPmNbLgPMSLm?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Focus on high-intent, industry-specific use cases to build topical and domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/SMYz7BeDXLx9yWSGoss8wPmNbLgPMSLm?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)

### Next Steps and Action Items

1.  FWD.digital to send 1-2 calibration articles for review (by tomorrow)
2.  Set up collaborative review space (Google Docs or Notion)
3.  Deepgram to provide comprehensive company and product description (one-pager)
4.  Explore integration of Deepgram-specific knowledge bases (non-blocking)
5.  Alexa to discuss with Peter and Caitlin for additional input on content clusters

### Additional Updates

  - [Current website traffic: 15,000-17,000 visitors/day (weekdays)](https://fathom.video/share/SMYz7BeDXLx9yWSGoss8wPmNbLgPMSLm?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)
  - [Potential collaboration with Cualo for enhanced email outreach capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/SMYz7BeDXLx9yWSGoss8wPmNbLgPMSLm?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Review calibration articles and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/SMYz7BeDXLx9yWSGoss8wPmNbLgPMSLm?tab=summary&timestamp=1250.0)
  - [Refine company description and product details](https://fathom.video/share/SMYz7BeDXLx9yWSGoss8wPmNbLgPMSLm?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
  - [Explore integration of Deepgram-specific knowledge bases](https://fathom.video/share/SMYz7BeDXLx9yWSGoss8wPmNbLgPMSLm?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
  - [Continue developing content clusters and use case ideas](https://fathom.video/share/SMYz7BeDXLx9yWSGoss8wPmNbLgPMSLm?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)
  - [Investigate Cualo's email outreach solution for potential implementation](https://fathom.video/share/SMYz7BeDXLx9yWSGoss8wPmNbLgPMSLm?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)
